module.name: roksbnkctl
module.description: roksbnkctl — deploy F5 BIG-IP Next for Kubernetes on IBM Cloud ROKS/IKS. Runs inside the digest-pinned roksbnkctl-tools-runner container image; no host tooling required.

required.name: region
required.description: IBM Cloud region for the ROKS/IKS cluster (e.g. us-south).

required.name: resource_group
required.description: IBM Cloud resource group the workspace resources are created in.

required.name: prefix
required.description: Resource-name prefix for everything this workspace creates (e.g. acme-eu).

required.name: cluster_name
required.description: New cluster name, or an existing cluster name/ID when not provisioning.

optional.name: provision_cluster
optional.description: true = provision a new ROKS cluster (gates the 'cluster up' step); false = attach to an existing one.

optional.name: deploy_bnk
optional.description: Gate for the 'bnk up' step. When false, only the cluster phase runs.
